title: townsendia montana var. minima
intro: Townsendia montana var. minima, also known as Mountain Sneezeweed, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and congestion. The health benefits of Mountain Sneezeweed include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and alleviating symptoms of the common cold and flu. Herbal preparations of Mountain Sneezeweed typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal or topical use.
